name: Title Text
default: SOLAR PV PLANT MONITORING - PORTFOLIO INTELLIGENCE OVERVIEW
helpText: Main heading displayed in the title row. Shown in uppercase.

name: Timezone Label
helpText: Timezone label displayed next to the clock (e.g. UTC+05:30, IST, GMT).

name: Timezone Offset (minutes from UTC)
helpText: Offset in minutes from UTC for the clock display. Examples: 330 for IST (UTC+05:30), 0 for GMT, -300 for EST.

name: Root / Default State ID
helpText: The ThingsBoard dashboard state ID that maps to the default tab. Used when state is 'default' or empty.
